sourceSummary.oneLine: Software validation report for DXView_W2 covering software description, requirements, design, V&V testing, risk analysis, and unresolved anomalies.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports domestic medical device software validation and regulatory documentation for DXView_W2.
keyPoints: DXView_W2 version 1.0.18.1213, revision Rv.1, was approved on 2021.05.28.
The software level of concern is classified as Minor.
DXView_W2 acquires medical images from a detector and supports storage, display, processing, DICOM transmission, DICOM printing, worklist, backup, restore, and DICOMDIR.
The report references software validation, risk management, quality system, DICOM, IEC, ISO, IEEE, FDA, and internal procedure documents.
Unit, integration, system, and user tests were reported as suitable, with most tests run 30 times and passed 30 times.
Unsolved anomalies and unresolved software anomalies are stated as not applicable.

entities.name: 피닉스비전
entities.evidence: 피닉스비전은 당사의 제품에 대하여 설계단계에서부터 생산 후 모니터링등 전반적인 프로세스에 대하여 발생 가능한 위험을 분석, 평가, 통제, 잔여위험평가 및 생산 후 제품에 대한 위험관리를 계획한다.

entities.name: PACS
entities.evidence: PACS: Picture Archiving and Communications System

entities.name: Microsoft Access
entities.evidence: DXView_W2는 내부적으로 Microsoft Access(로컬용)를 데이터베이스 엔진으로 사용하며, 각 기능 별 요청에 따라 해당하는 작업을 수행한다.

concepts.name: Software Validation Report
concepts.evidence: This document defines the Software Validation Report(SVR) for DXView_W2 on verified software

concepts.name: Level of Concern: Minor
concepts.pageTarget: Medical device software level of concern
concepts.evidence: If the answers to all of the question in Tables 1 and 2 above are "No", the Level of Concern is likely to be "Minor"

concepts.name: DICOM 3.0
concepts.evidence: DICOM 3.0 규격을 통해 영상정보의 전송을 제어 및 관리 한다.

concepts.name: Modality Worklist
concepts.evidence: DXView_W2는 병원정보시스템(HIS)과 연동하기 위해 필요한 DICOM 워크리스트 매니지먼트(Worklist Management) 기능도 기본적으로 설치되어 있다.

concepts.name: Unresolved Software Anomalies
concepts.evidence: 12.2 Unresolved Software Anomalies(해결되지 않은 소프트웨어 변칙) 해당없음

evidence.claim: The document is a Software Validation Report for DXView_W2.
evidence.evidenceText: This document defines the Software Validation Report(SVR) for DXView_W2 on verified software

evidence.claim: The document applies to DXView_W2 and addresses software validation activities.
evidence.evidenceText: This document applies to DXView_W2 and addresses the software validation activities.

evidence.claim: DXView_W2 version is 1.0.18.1213 and revision is Rv.1.
The approval date shown in the signature block is 2021.05.28.
DXView_W2 is classified as Minor level of concern.
evidence.evidenceText: SRS 1 Main Module Minor ... SRS 8 DICOM Module Minor
evidence.pageTarget: Medical device software level of concern

evidence.claim: DXView_W2 acquires medical images from a detector and supports storage, enlargement, reduction, viewing, and transmission.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 의료영상전송장치소프트웨어는 의료영상획득장치로부터 디지털로 변환된 의료용 영상을 취득하여 저장, 확대, 축소, 조회, 전송 처리를 하는 소프트웨어

evidence.claim: The operating system requirement is Microsoft Windows 7 or 10, 32-bit or higher.
evidence.evidenceText: Operating system(운영 시스템) : Microsoft Windows 7 or 10 32비트 이상

evidence.claim: The program language and tools include C++ and MS Visual C++ .NET 2002 and 2008.
evidence.evidenceText: 개발언어 C++ / 편집기 MS Visual C++ .NET 2002 and 2008

evidence.claim: DXView_W2 supports DICOM Modality Worklist Find, DICOM Image SCU, and DICOM CD Support.
evidence.evidenceText: DICOM Module Minor - DICOM Modality Worklist Find - DICOM Image SCU - DICOM CD Support

evidence.claim: DXView_W2 uses Microsoft Access as a local database engine.
evidence.evidenceText: DXView_W2는 내부적으로 Microsoft Access(로컬용)를 데이터베이스 엔진으로 사용하며

evidence.claim: Image acquisition time must not exceed 10 seconds and image open time must display within 3 seconds per image.
evidence.evidenceText: 영상획득시간 디텍터로부터 영상획득시간이 10초를 넘지 않아야 한다. ... 영상오픈시간 Browser모드에서 영상 오픈 시 한 장당 3초 이내에 Display모드 화면에 표시하여야 한다.

evidence.claim: The report references FDA software submission guidance, FDA software validation principles, 21 CFR Parts 820 and 803, ISO 14971:2007, ISO 13485:2003, IEEE standards, and IEC 62304.
evidence.evidenceText: 9.3 Reference ... FDA ... 21 CFR, Part 820 ... 21 CFR, Part 803 ... ISO 14971:2007 ... ISO 13485:2003 ... IEEE Std ... IEC 62304

evidence.claim: The hazard analysis legal requirements identify Korean Medical Device Act and KGMP for authorization purposes.
evidence.evidenceText: 법적인 요구사항 - 의료기기법 한국의 의료기기법 및 관련 규정 - KGMP 인허가 목적의 의료기기품질경영시스템

evidence.claim: The hazard analysis general standards include IEC 60601-1, ISO 14971, ISO 13485, and DICOM 3.0.
evidence.evidenceText: 일반적인 규격 요구사항 - IEC 60601-1 General requirement of safety - ISO 14971-(2007) Medical device-Risk Management - ISO 13485 Medical Device-Quality Management System - DICOM 3.0-(2003)

evidence.claim: Unsolved anomalies and unresolved software anomalies are not applicable.
evidence.evidenceText: 12. Unsolved Anomalies(미해결 이상 현상) ... 해당없음 ... 12.2 Unresolved Software Anomalies(해결되지 않은 소프트웨어 변칙) 해당없음

evidence.claim: Unit, integration, system, and user test reports are included as appendices.
evidence.evidenceText: Appendix 1 Verification & Validation Test Report(Unit Test) ... Appendix 2 ... Integration Test ... Appendix 3 ... System Test ... Appendix 4 ... User Test

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is partly inferred from source metadata and path: authoritySignal is MFDS/domestic and sourcePath indicates 국내 제조인증, while the document text also references FDA/CDRH and Korean legal requirements.
Document date is taken from the approval signature date 2021.05.28; author and reviewer dates are 2021.05.27.
The source text includes OCR or table-order artifacts, including repeated headings and some misplaced table rows, but key metadata and claims are readable.
